name: Cycles OpenClaw Budget Guard
description: OpenClaw plugin for budget-aware model and tool execution using Cycles.

enabled.description: Master switch to enable or disable the plugin.

cyclesBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the Cycles server (e.g. https://cycles.example.com). Falls back to CYCLES_BASE_URL env var.

cyclesApiKey.description: API key for the Cycles server. Falls back to CYCLES_API_KEY env var.

tenant.description: Cycles tenant identifier for budget scoping.

budgetId.description: Optional budget identifier for more specific scope targeting.

defaultModelActionKind.description: Action kind used when reserving budget for model calls.

defaultToolActionKindPrefix.description: Prefix prepended to tool names to form the action kind.

lowBudgetThreshold.description: Remaining budget amount below which the budget is considered low (triggers model downgrade).

exhaustedThreshold.description: Remaining budget amount at or below which the budget is considered exhausted.

modelFallbacks.description: Map from expensive model name to cheaper fallback model name or ordered array of fallback candidates.

toolBaseCosts.description: Map from tool name to estimated cost in the configured currency unit.

injectPromptBudgetHint.description: Whether to inject a short budget status hint into the system prompt.

maxPromptHintChars.description: Maximum character length for the injected budget hint.

failClosed.description: If true, exhausted budget blocks execution. If false, logs a warning and continues.

logLevel.description: Minimum log level for plugin output.

modelBaseCosts.description: Map from model name to estimated cost per completion in the configured currency.

defaultModelCost.description: Fallback cost per model completion when model is not in modelBaseCosts.

userId.description: Optional user identifier for per-user budget scoping.

sessionId.description: Optional session identifier for per-session budget scoping.

reservationTtlMs.description: Time-to-live in milliseconds for budget reservations.

toolReservationTtls.description: Per-tool TTL overrides for budget reservations.

snapshotCacheTtlMs.description: TTL in milliseconds for the budget snapshot cache.

overagePolicy.description: Overage policy for budget reservations (REJECT, ALLOW, ALLOW_WITH_CAPS).

budgetTransitionWebhookUrl.description: URL to POST budget level transition events to.

toolAllowlist.description: If set, only tools matching these patterns are permitted. Supports * wildcards.

toolBlocklist.description: Tools matching these patterns are always blocked. Supports * wildcards.

lowBudgetStrategies.description: Ordered list of strategies to apply when budget is low: downgrade_model, reduce_max_tokens, disable_expensive_tools, limit_remaining_calls.

maxTokensWhenLow.description: Max output tokens to request when reduce_max_tokens strategy is active.

expensiveToolThreshold.description: Tool cost threshold for disable_expensive_tools strategy. Defaults to lowBudgetThreshold / 10.

maxRemainingCallsWhenLow.description: Max remaining tool calls when limit_remaining_calls strategy is active.

retryOnDeny.description: Retry a denied tool reservation after a short delay.

retryDelayMs.description: Delay in milliseconds before retrying a denied reservation.

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for denied reservations.

dryRun.description: Run in simulation mode without a live Cycles server.

dryRunBudget.description: Simulated starting budget for dry-run mode.

analyticsWebhookUrl.description: URL to POST session summary data to at agent_end.

modelCurrency.description: Currency for model reservations (defaults to currency).

parentBudgetId.description: Parent budget scope for team/pool budget visibility.
